hero.name: Gustavo Meoño
hero.tagline: I build tech that moves businesses.
hero.subtitle: CTO with 9+ years of experience building engineering teams and scalable platforms. Currently at Commando, leading the tech behind 20+ locations.

about.heading: About
about.intro: I like building things — teams, systems, products.
about.p1: I've spent the last decade working between engineering and business. I've built teams from scratch, architected platforms serving millions of users, and learned that the best technical decisions are the ones that understand the business context.
about.p2: I'm just as comfortable writing code as I am presenting to a board. I've grown teams from 4 to 54 people, and what I enjoy most is seeing people grow alongside the product.
about.p3: I studied Computer Engineering at UNAM with a specialization in Networks & Security. I'm a certified Scrum Master, I've given three talks on AI implementation, and I still write Go when I can.

unam.description: Managed 3 development teams with 9+ people at UNICA, the university's software unit. Mentored interns, defined architectures with PHP and Laravel, and improved delivery processes. It was my first experience leading engineers and where I realized I enjoyed the human side as much as the technical one.

flink_em.description: Joined as the first engineer and built the technical foundation from scratch — backend with Node.js and Django, mobile apps with Kotlin and Swift, and full AWS infrastructure. I also set the coding standards and DevOps practices the team would use as we grew.

flink_vp.description: Led the engineering team behind an investment app that crossed 1M+ downloads. The team grew from 4 to 54 engineers. I focused a lot on culture — 1:1 mentoring, career paths, and creating an environment where people wanted to stay. We hit 85% eNPS and 90% retention.

flink_bi.description: Created the Business Intelligence department from scratch. Built the first Data Warehouse and ETL pipelines with Databricks. The analytics we built helped drive 25% revenue growth. I also coordinated regulatory compliance with CNBV for all financial operations.

pepper.description: Built the engineering team from zero again. We worked with generative AI applied to fintech products, I architected microservices in Go, and we set up CI/CD pipelines that let us iterate fast. We also built native modules for Android and iOS.

commando.description: I'm building Commando's technology organization — from the technical vision to hiring the team. I architected Go microservices on AWS that operate across 20+ gyms. I also built internal platforms for analytics, payroll, and inventory, plus a unified data layer for the fitness and payments systems.

leadership.title: CTO as a Service
leadership.description: Technical vision, engineering strategy, and hands-on leadership — without a full-time commitment.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: Microservices design, cloud-native platforms on AWS/GCP, and systems built to grow with your business.

teams.title: Team Building
teams.description: Hiring, culture, and mentoring. I've grown teams from 4 to 54+ people while keeping 90% retention.

data.title: Data & Intelligence
data.description: Warehouses, pipelines, and dashboards — the infrastructure for making data-driven decisions.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Practical generative AI implementation. Focused on solving real problems, not chasing trends.

product.title: MVP to Launch
product.description: End-to-end product development — mobile, web, and fintech. I've taken several products from zero to production.

howIWork.heading: How I Work
howIWork.title: It's not all code.
howIWork.subtitle: Technical skills matter, but these are the ones that actually make projects work.

leadership.label: Leadership
leadership.title: People-First Leadership
leadership.description: I focus on creating environments where people do their best work. 1:1 mentoring, career paths, and lots of communication. The 90% retention and 85 eNPS I achieved at Flink came from that.
leadership.skills: Team Building | 1:1 Mentoring | Career Development | Conflict Resolution | Hiring & Onboarding | Performance Reviews | Culture Design | Emotional Intelligence | Remote Team Management | Cross-generational Leadership

methodology.label: Methodology
methodology.title: Pragmatic Agile
methodology.description: Certified Scrum Master, but not dogmatic about it. I use what works for each team — sometimes it's Scrum, sometimes Kanban, sometimes a hybrid. What matters is delivering well and consistently.
methodology.skills: Scrum (SMPC Certified) | Kanban | Sprint Planning | Retrospectives | Iterative Delivery | CI/CD Culture | DevOps Practices | QA Strategy | Tech Debt Management | Release Management

technical.label: Strategy
technical.title: Tech with Business Context
technical.description: Technical decisions don't live in a vacuum. I always consider scale, cost, and time to deliver. My job is making sure technology is aligned with business goals.
technical.skills: Technology Roadmapping | Architecture Decision Records | Build vs Buy Analysis | Vendor Evaluation | Cost Optimization | Scalability Planning | Security Best Practices | Compliance (CNBV/Fintech) | MVP Scoping | Technical Due Diligence

communication.label: Communication
communication.title: Bridge Between Teams
communication.description: I move well between technical conversations and business meetings. I've coordinated with regulators (CNBV), presented to boards, and given talks on AI implementation in tech communities.
communication.skills: Executive Presentations | Board Reporting | Technical Writing | Public Speaking (3 talks) | Stakeholder Management | Cross-functional Alignment | Translating Tech for Non-Tech | Workshop Facilitation | Investor Communication | Community Engagement

contact.heading: Want to chat?
contact.subtitle: If you have a project, need to build a team, or want to explore a technical idea, drop me a line.
contact.name: Name
